name: showcase
description: Storybook story creation, catalog management, and Visual Regression integration. UI component docs, visual testing, and CSF 3.0/Factories story creation. Supports Storybook 10 and React Cosmos.

capabilities.summary: Storybook story creation (CSF 3.0, factories, MDX 3, autodocs, play functions)
React Cosmos fixture creation (Cosmos 6+, useFixtureInput, decorators)
Chromatic, Playwright VRT, Lost Pixel, Applitools Eyes integration
axe-core rules and WCAG 2.2 AA verification
Reuse stories in unit/Vitest tests via composeStories
Component reuse rate and design-code alignment tracking

recipes.label: Storybook Interactions
recipes.when: Play function authoring with `@storybook/test`, addon-vitest integration

recipes.label: MDX Documentation
recipes.when: Hand-authored MDX docs with Doc Blocks, Autodocs vs MDX trade-off

recipes.label: React Cosmos
recipes.when: React Cosmos fixture authoring, Storybook vs Cosmos decision

recipes.label: Accessibility Addon
recipes.when: Storybook addon-a11y wiring (axe-core), per-story rules, CI failure thresholds, role-aware keyboard testing

recipes.label: Chromatic
recipes.when: Chromatic-specific visual review — Tokens of Trust, branch comparison, TurboSnap, baseline approval flow, monorepo project routing

recipes.label: Coverage
recipes.when: Story coverage tracking — which components have stories, addon-coverage / addon-test, gap reporting, CI gate
